response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed Minecraft gameplay with consistent background vocal music. 2. Identified the music as the popular song 'Baka Mitai' (ばかみたい). 3. Resolved the original composer as Mitsuharu Fukuyama and identified the performer in the video as Ninomae Ina'nis. 4. Searched for the original Japanese lyrics and English translation of 'Baka Mitai'. 5. Constructed the JSON object with the complete lyrics and scene timestamps.
response.global_summary: A Minecraft gameplay video featuring Ninomae Ina'nis farming with the song 'Baka Mitai' playing in the background throughout the entire duration.

scenes.description: The video starts with the performer in a chicken coop, then proceeds to farming activities in Minecraft. The song 'Baka Mitai' plays consistently in the background throughout the entire video.

なのに なのに どうして サヨナラは言えたの
だめだね だめよ だめなのよ
あんたが 好きで好きすぎて
どれだけ 強いお酒でも

あんた信じるばかりで

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
So foolish, you're such a child.
Chased dreams and got hurt.
You're so bad at lying, but still showed me that unconvincing smile.
You don't say "I love you" enough.
You're always awkward with your words.
So how did you ever find the words to say goodbye?
This is no good, no good, no good at all.
I love you, I love you too much.
No matter how strong the drink,
The memories are never muddied; what a fool.
So foolish, truly stupid.
All I did was believe in you;
Pretending to be a strong woman, showered in a sorrowful night wind.
It's been over 3 years since I became alone.
Even the cityscape has changed.
Even so, even so, why are only my regrets left behind?
You truly are not a good man.
I take off the ring we bought together.
"This is what you deserve!" I feel relieved.
Even if I wait forever, it's so foolish.
This isn't good, no good, no good at all.
I love you, I love you too much.
No matter how strong the drink,
The memories aren't muddied; what a fool.
You truly are not a good man.
I take off the ring we bought together.
It's what I deserve, I feel relieved.
What are these tears? I'm so foolish.
